basic_details.job_title: BFUHS Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS)
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 37 years Age Relaxation Applicable: Punjab Govt. employees: up to 45 years Widow, divorcees and certain other categories of married women: up to 40 years

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma or Bachelor's in Engineering (Civil/Mechanical) with experience.
qualification.details: Junior Engineer (Civil and Mechanical): Three years Diploma of Engineering in the subject concerned (Civil / Mechanical) from a recognized Board / University / Institution with 3 years working experience. Bachelor in Engineering in Civil / Mechanical from a recognized University / Institution.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BFUHS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BFUHS Junior Engineer posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the BFUHS Junior Engineer posts is 05 July 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the Junior Engineer posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a three-year Diploma of Engineering in Civil/Mechanical or a Bachelor's degree in Engineering (Civil/Mechanical) from a recognized institution. Relevant work experience is also required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to BFUHS Junior Engineer positions?
faq.answer: The age limit for applicants is between 18 and 37 years. Age relaxation is applicable for certain categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Engineer post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Junior Engineer post, with one each for Civil and Mechanical disciplines.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the BFUHS recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 2360/- for all categories except SC, for whom it is Rs. 1180/-.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Junior Engineer posts at BFUHS?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a Written Test and evaluation of Experience.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I find the official notification for BFUHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article or via the official website of BFUHS.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any work experience required for the Junior Engineer posts?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates with a Diploma in Engineering are required to have 3 years of working experience in the relevant field.

faq.question: Q9. What is the pay scale for the Junior Engineer posts?
faq.answer: The salary for the Junior Engineer posts will be as per the 7th CPC pay matrix.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from outside Punjab apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification does not explicitly restrict applications from outside Punjab, but age relaxation is mentioned for Punjab Govt. employees. Interested candidates should check the detailed eligibility criteria in the official notification.
